ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state's geographic center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state's geographic center */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Unique two-letter code for each state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease (e.g., 2009 H1N1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "transmission_mode" TEXT /* Mode of transmission of the disease */,
  "incubation_period" TEXT /* Typical incubation period of the disease */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the disease (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "vaccination_available" INTEGER /* Whether a vaccine is available for the disease */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state where the statistic was recorded */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the disease the statistic is for */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Number of cases reported */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population affected */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the statistic */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was reported */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the affected population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the affected population */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source providing the statistic */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government agency, research institution) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, researcher, healthcare professional) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
